inputs.contract_change: Change GET /users to return created_at as RFC3339 instead of a Unix epoch.

expected_outputs.change_patch:
diff --git a/api/users.py b/api/users.py
@@ serialize created_at as RFC3339 @@
diff --git a/clients/js/users.ts ...
@@ parse RFC3339 @@
expected_outputs.compatibility_notes: Consumers: web client, mobile client, billing job. Breaking for billing job (parses epoch); added a one-release dual-format shim and a migration note.

notes: Changes an API contract, enumerates consumers, and documents the compatibility story.
